points.label: Privacy eye on the Se/cure wordmark
points.summary: The privacy notice's opener moved out of the header icon row onto the wordmark itself: on /cure an eye-in-a-circle now sits right after 'Se/cure' in the header (flag blue, small), and the old unstyled ℹ button between the ghost and share icons is gone. PASS: tapping the eye opens the privacy popover ('Privacy — what this session sends where') anchored under the left side of the header; the popover now ends with a 'Read on in the documentation — how Se/cure works →' link that opens /cure/help/ in a new tab; tapping anywhere outside closes the popover; and tapping the brand TEXT (not the eye) still opens the intro pane as before. FAIL: the eye opening the intro pane, the popover still appearing on the right edge, or any leftover ℹ button in the icon row.
